gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage:
feat: Add typed React Flow nodes and dagre auto-layout

- Defined extensible `AgentNodeData` and `ScriptNodeData` types for React Flow.
- Created custom `AgentNode` and `ScriptNode` components with top/bottom handles.
- Integrated `dagre` to enforce an automated top-to-bottom layout for the canvas.
- Replaced the hardcoded node state in `PipelineCanvas` with edge support and layout functionality.

pullRequest.title: Add typed React Flow nodes and dagre auto-layout
pullRequest.description:
This PR implements the requested React Flow improvements by adding typed, extensible nodes (`AgentNode`, `ScriptNode`) and integrating `dagre` for automated top-to-bottom layout to prevent nodes from getting lost or scattered. Handles are added for relational edge connections.

---
*PR created automatically by Jules for task [12811396828380777296](https://jules.google.com/task/12811396828380777296) started by @A517-AB*
